original_image_tags: A mostly blank, off-white page, likely the back of a document. Two black binder holes are punched at the bottom edge. A handwritten note in pink or red ink is visible in the upper right corner.

elements.description: A blank or mostly blank page with handwritten red text at the top reading 'EXCLOSURE 62-83894-52' and three dark circular binder punch holes along the bottom edge.

judge.reason: Description A states there are two binder holes, while Description B states there are three, creating a direct contradiction on a specific object count.
